data.title: Nium introduces stablecoin card issuance on Visa & Mastercard for businesses to use digital dollar balances at POS.
data.description: The platform's goal is to assist companies in issuing cards funded by stablecoins, enabling the use of digital dollar balances for purchases through current card networks.

data.title: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of Berkshire Hathaway Homestate Insurance Company and Its Affiliates
data.description: AM Best has confirmed the Financial Strength Rating (FSR) of A++ (Superior) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Ratings (Long-Term ICR) of “aa+” (Superior) for Berkshire Hathaway Homestate Insurance Company and its property/casualty affiliates based in Omaha, NE. Together known as Berkshire Hathaway Homestate Companies (BHHC), the ratings reflect a stable outlook. These ratings apply to the following companies within the BHHC group.

data.title: KFC® Has an Answer to the Value Wars: A Value Feast Fit for the Moment
data.description: KFC is excited to launch Box Feasts, a new menu offering starting at $7. This lineup aims to provide customers with increased quantities of chicken at affordable prices. The initiative, unveiled in Plano, Texas on March 30, 2026, represents a strategic shift for the company towards offering greater value to its customers.

data.title: Dogecoin Can't Break 10 Cents While Meme Coins Bleed—What's Next?
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has experienced a 2.5% increase in value but struggles to surpass the crucial $0.10 mark, while meme coin dominance dropped from 0.042 in mid-February to 0.034 in March. This decline indicates a shift in capital away from meme tokens. Data from CryptoQuant reveals that Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), a central platform for memecoin speculation, has witnessed a significant decrease in on-chain activity. The number of daily traders on decentralized exchanges within Solana has reached historic lows, with participation dwindling to just a few thousand individuals. Quality coins that previously had the potential for 100M–1B trading volume are now constrained to a range of 500k-20M. Analyst Shah noted that the chain is essentially deserted, with X user @capexbt describing it as a "ghost town." For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
